full_text:
Zhao Jian (Shumao) 趙戩 (叔茂)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Jian (趙戩), styledShumao (叔茂), was born in Jingzhao. Maintained composure even when Dong Zhuo threatened him for opposing some plans. Buried Wang Yun. Zhao Jian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, Liu Biao, and the Wei Kingdom. Zhao Jian lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
